project_type: Next.js 14.2.5 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
build_system: npm with Next.js built-in compiler. No custom Makefile or build scripts.
test_framework: No test framework currently configured. Validation via npm run build (static type checking + route compilation).
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build and confirm all routes compile. 2. Check that /chart-kitchen, /dashboard, /journal, /missions, /roadmap, /auth all appear in the build output as compiled pages.
environment_constraints: Internet available for npm install. No Supabase credentials available - all Supabase operations must gracefully fallback. No market data API keys - must use demo/fallback candles. No AI API keys - must return mock responses.
contribution_requirements: Work only in existing repo. Do not create duplicate apps. No hardcoded localhost ports. Auth redirects must use relative routes. App must not crash when env vars are missing.
key_patterns: Components use inline styles (not CSS modules). 'use client' directive for interactive components. Lazy Supabase singleton in lib/supabase.ts that throws if not configured. API routes in app/api/. Kitchen components in components/kitchen/. TCU canon lingo enforced (FVG=leftover container, Entry=the pass, SL=burn point, etc). Characters are event-driven via CharacterTriggerEngine. XP/badge system uses localStorage via lib/xp-reward-engine.ts and lib/progression.ts.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages (50+ route folders). components/ - React components organized by feature (kitchen/, auth/, tcu/, triggers/). lib/ - Business logic, engines, utilities. db/ - SQL schema files. public/ - Static assets. No src/ directory is used for app logic (it exists but is not the main code path).
